title: Vegapunk Reveals the Sinking World
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Warcury, Unknown person #12 as Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
scene: Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What power!! It's sucking us in!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gaba BA BA!! This is a real thrill!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the?! Straw hat?! You look like an old man?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'M ALL OUT OF FOOD, AND POWER...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fernented Shark! It's an emergency ration from ElBAF! GABA B4 BA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It may stink, but it's tasty!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ngn... WOAH! That hit the spot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Gegya Gya Gya! Your body's so expressive!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: How hard is this guy's skin?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! Hey! Hang on! Wh-what the world!!! who goes there?!

summary: This part advances the Vegapunk’s Broadcast through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
